infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Iron Guild needs camera access to take photos and videos for your posts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Iron Guild needs photo library access to attach photos and videos to your posts.

plugins.cameraPermission: Iron Guild needs camera access to take photos and videos for your posts.
plugins.photosPermission: Iron Guild needs photo library access to attach photos and videos to your posts.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Iron Guild reads your workouts from Apple Health so you can share them with the guild.
